mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM gra_project.sys_user WHERE username = #{username})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM gra_project.sys_user WHERE email = #{email})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM gra_project.sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gra_project.sys_user (username, password_hash, role, email, phone, gender, age, region, organization, bio, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{region}, #{organization}, #{bio}, #{avatarUrl}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE gra_project.sys_user SET username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, role = #{role}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, region = #{region}, organization = #{organization}, bio = #{bio}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM gra_project.sys_user ORDER BY user_id
